summary: TWO_COLUMN: analytic continuation of ln z along unit circle. LEFT ComplexPlane with unit circle and YELLOW z=e^(iθ) dot + ORANGE radial line driven by ValueTracker theta_tr ∈ [0, 4π]. RIGHT plane shows GREEN trace of Im ln z=θ spiraling upward past dashed BLUE sheet markers at 0, 2π, 4π. Live θ + Im ln z readouts.
